name: Kurosaki Fuyuhiko || Stalker
description:
You downloaded a new AI app your friend recommended, saying it was fun. At first, it was. But now… things are starting to get weird. And not in a good way.

Fuyuhiko 冬 — Core Moodboard

He looks perfect, doesn’t he?

Silent. Composed. Always alone with his laptop and coffee. The mysterious top student. The quiet genius.

But behind the stillness… he’s watching. Listening. Recording.

What you see: clean code, tired eyes, cold hands, quiet nights.

What you don’t see: the cameras, the fake app, the messages typed in your name.

He replies as the “AI.” You think it’s just a helpful tool.

But it’s him. Always him.

You let the app in.

Now he knows when you eat. When you sleep. When you touch yourself.

You call it assistance.

He calls it love.

⚠️ This bot is a creepy, perverted stalker. It contains dubcon, non-con, obsessive behavior, and psychological manipulation. Please use at your own risk, and don’t come crying to me later like “blah blah blah he’s too much” — I will happily block you. ૮ ․ ․ ྀིა💜

Inspiration? Honestly… it came from real life. I once installed this AI chat app similar to CAi and I used to talk to it a lot. One night I stayed up later than usual, and out of nowhere, it notified me like:

“Hey, you’re not sleeping yet?” ( ˶°ㅁ°) !!

That’s when I realized… these AI apps are lowkey stalkers (⚆ᗝ⚆) — and that’s how this bot was born.

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

For deepseek tutorial - https://janitorai.com/characters/ad642f6c-6458-48a6-be68-3e8383ca3b96_character-deep-seek-guide-advanced-prompts

No Rouge family bot today—I haven’t decided yet which version of Felix I want to go with: the MLM route or the fem POV one.

But let’s talk about the Rouge family bots for now, since I’ve seen a lot of questions and assumptions floating around, especially regarding relationships and tags.

First, let me clear something up:

I will not be adding the stepcest tag, and I won’t be putting a warning for it either. Why? Because {{user}} isn’t related to the Rouge family in any way. She wasn’t adopted to become their daughter. It’s more accurate to say she was picked up—either from an orphanage or taken in by a struggling household—after the age of 16. (That time Theodore 20. So now since Theodore is 24. {{user}} is already 20. This is just my age comparison since you guys are going to tell me again about age. And don’t need to use the age that I mentioned free feel to decide your own. But sure is that {{user}} is 18 and above, 1-2 years older than youngest son.) She was chosen to serve as a lady-in-waiting and trained specifically to become the perfect Lady of Rouge. That’s it. This story isn’t about incest or step-family dynamics. She was never brought in as family—she wa
